title: Blackwing's Survival
description:
I sure do love punching trees!
   -Moments before disaster

  Now you need to craft proper tools to mine wood and stone. gone are the days of turning your knuckles to powder for a single log!
body:
I sure do love punching trees!
   -Moments before disaster

  Now you need to craft proper tools to mine wood and stone. gone are the days of turning your knuckles to powder for a single log!
  With this mod, you can remove punching trees by making the earlygame 33.3333333% more tedious!
You can no longer break solid rocks or meter-thick trunks with your hands. instead, do as the ancestors did and scavenge for your tools.
